'member' => [ 'shape' => 'VpcEndpointId', ], ], 'VpcEndpointStatus' => [ 'type' => 'string', 'enum' => [ 'CREATING', 'CREATE_FAILED', 'ACTIVE', 'UPDATING', 'UPDATE_FAILED', 'DELETING', 'DELETE_FAILED', ], ], 'VpcEndpointSummary' => [ 'type' => 'structure', 'members' => [ 'VpcEndpointId' => [ 'shape' => 'VpcEndpointId', ], 'VpcEndpointOwner' => [ 'shape' => 'String', ], 'DomainArn' => [ 'shape' => 'DomainArn', ], 'Status' => [ 'shape' => 'VpcEndpointStatus', ], ], ], 'VpcEndpointSummaryList' => [ 'type' => 'list', 'member' => [ 'shape' => 'VpcEndpointSummary', ], ], 'VpcEndpoints' => [ 'type' => 'list', 'member' => [ 'shape' => 'VpcEndpoint', ], ], 'WindowStartTime' => [ 'type' => 'structure', 'required' => [ 'Hours', 'Minutes', ], 'members' => [ 'Hours' => [ 'shape' => 'StartTimeHours', ], 'Minutes' => [ 'shape' => 'StartTimeMinutes', ], ], ], 'ZoneAwarenessConfig' => [ 'type' => 'structure', 'members' => [ 'AvailabilityZoneCount' => [ 'shape' => 'IntegerClass', ], ], ], 'ZoneStatus' => [ 'type' => 'string', 'enum' => [ 'Active', 'StandBy', 'NotAvailable', ], ], ],];
